---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Minimal Reproducible Example

```python
# Paste the smallest piece of code that triggers the error
```

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full traceback if applicable.

## Environment

| Item | Version |
|------|---------|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14.4 |
| Python | e.g. 3.11.3 |
| pyTransit | e.g. 1.1.0 |
| photutils | e.g. 3.0.0 |
| astropy | e.g. 6.0.1 |
| batman-package | e.g. 2.5.3 |

## Additional Context

Any other context (e.g., FITS header snippets, config YAML excerpt).
